jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Meritnation
jsonLd.description:
Meritnation, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Meritnation:
Meritnation is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Meritnation!
